meaning: n.尸体,文集,(某项基金的)本金
examples: The two halves are linked by a trunkline of between 200 and 300 million nerves, the corpus callosum.
Research showed that these two halves of the brain had different functions, and that the corpus callosum enabled them to work together.
Scientists have found quite recently that the corpus callosum in women is always larger and probably richer in nerve fibres than it is in men.
The prisoners there have access to lawyers, and the federal courts oversee habeas corpus cases.
Martinez (sprained right knee) was scheduled to start a rehab assignment at Double-A Corpus Christi.
